---
name: Action item
about: Agent-generated action item from an /ask advisory session, to be implemented via /feature-issue.
title: ""
---

## Summary

One to two sentences describing the action item. The issue title is entered separately in the GitHub UI when creating the issue — this field is not an automatic title source.

## Advisory context

Required (by convention — GitHub does not enforce this for markdown-bodied templates).

Designated place for the /ask agent to record what was discussed in the advisory session, what approaches were ruled out, and why this action item was created.

**Discussion summary**

What was the advisory session about? What problem or goal was being explored?

**Ruled-out alternatives**

What approaches were considered and rejected, and why?

**Assumptions carried forward**

What premises or constraints from the advisory session should the implementer treat as settled?

## Acceptance criteria

Required. Write criteria as behavioral assertions or verifiable outcomes (e.g., "Running X produces Y", "File Z exists and contains W") — not as prose descriptions. The downstream /feature-issue session uses these to determine when work is complete.

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Related links

Optional. Files, prior issues, PRs, or docs the advisory session referenced.

-

## Open questions

Optional. Explicit unknowns carried forward from the advisory session for the implementer to resolve.

-
